title: Nonretroactive effect
doc_html:
§511.  Nonretroactive effect

Notwithstanding any other provision of the law to the contrary, the provisions of this Chapter shall apply only to contracts that are entered into subsequent to July 31, 1974.

Acts 1986, No. 113, §1.
